result: The data cleaning task has been completed successfully. The output file data/output/cleaned_data.csv contains 14,586 rows and 9 columns: NSID (cohort member identifier), ghq15, ghq17, ghq25, ghq32 (pre-derived GHQ-12 scores), and ghqtl15, ghqtl17, ghqtl25, ghqtl32 (manually computed GHQ-12 sum scores). All processing steps were completed including loading 6 tab-delimited files, merging by NSID, harmonizing missing-value codes, computing sum scores with proper missing value handling, applying variable labels, and converting to factors.
